question: Design a C++ class named `Book` with private member variables for `title` (string), `author` (string), and `isbn` (string). Provide public getter and setter methods for each attribute.

test_cases.expected:
Initial Book Details:
Title: The Silent Patient
Author: Alex Michaelides
ISBN: 978-1250301697

Updated Book Details:
Title: Where the Crawdads Sing
Author: Unknown Author
ISBN: 978-0735219090

errors: The `setAuthor` method contains a logical error. It assigns a fixed string "Unknown Author" to the `author` member variable instead of using the `newAuthor` parameter provided. This means the author can never be set to the desired value using this method.
